title: Matt Raynor – Professional Overview
summary: Matt is a talented AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer and quadriplegic (C5–C6) who has successfully transitioned to independent living. He is actively seeking employment in AI engineering, applied ML, or full-stack development roles.

goals: Secure a remote-friendly AI engineering or full-stack development role
Avoid live coding/whiteboard interviews due to his disability
Highlight production-grade AI/ML work and adaptive technology usage

recent_projects.ai_shopping_assistant: Agentic AI shopping assistant using LangChain and Claude - live at store.matthewraynor.com
recent_projects.computer_vision_pipeline: Enterprise photo validation system with TensorFlow.js and MediaPipe
recent_projects.wall_visualization: ML-powered wall visualization using MiDaS depth estimation
recent_projects.totetaxi: Full-stack logistics platform with React 19, TypeScript, Django REST
recent_projects.historyface: AI face swap SaaS using face_recognition and HuggingFace models

ideal_roles: Companies hiring based on portfolio over whiteboard tests

why_hire: Production-grade AI/ML experience with computer vision and LLM integration
Self-taught using adaptive technology - demonstrates exceptional problem-solving
Ships real products: agentic AI assistants, computer vision pipelines, full-stack platforms
Methodical engineering approach - plans deeply, breaks down problems clearly
